articles.author: Sam McNeil
articles.title: EU hits Google with $1 billion fine over its Play app store and search - AP News
articles.description: The European Union has fined Google $1 billion for breaking digital antitrust regulations. The EU says Google set up its search engine and Google Play to favor its own services over competitors. This is part of Brussels' ongoing efforts to regulate big tech c…
articles.content: BRUSSELS (AP) The European Union on Thursday hit Google with a fine of 890 million euros ($1 billion) after it said the technology behemoth broke digital antitrust regulations by setting up Google Pl… [+2478 chars]
